doctorPreference.title: Doctor Preference
doctorPreference.priority: Dr. Chen likes this set-up every time
doctorPreference.detail: Have articulating paper already in the field before distal reduction, and keep the mirror parked lingual so she can check clearance before the chamfer pass.

steps.label: Step 01
steps.title: Occlusal Reduction to Depth
steps.detail: Doctor is establishing occlusal clearance first; keep water up, evacuate continuously, and call out if cusp depth starts to look uneven.
steps.operatorCue: High-volume suction on the distal, mirror ready, and keep the reduction grooves visible between passes.
steps.verification: Occlusal table is reduced evenly and the doctor is ready to break contact.

predictedHandoff.label: Predicted Handoff
predictedHandoff.supportingItem: High-speed handpiece stays live in B2; next move is break contact on the mesial and distal.
predictedHandoff.timing: As soon as occlusal clearance is accepted
predictedHandoff.trigger: Bur swap immediately after depth check.

steps.label: Step 02
steps.title: Break Interproximal Contact
steps.detail: Doctor is opening mesial and distal contact for draw; keep the field dry and be ready to pass articulating paper for the distal check.
steps.operatorCue: Stay tight with suction, protect the adjacent tooth, and hand the paper the moment Dr. Chen asks for the clearance check.
steps.verification: Contacts are open cleanly and the doctor is ready to reduce axial walls.

predictedHandoff.label: Predicted Handoff
predictedHandoff.supportingItem: Prep bur is next for axial reduction; mirror and suction stay parked while the doctor sets taper.
predictedHandoff.trigger: Release once distal clearance is confirmed.

steps.label: Step 03
steps.title: Axial Reduction and Chamfer Refinement
steps.detail: Doctor is refining axial walls and dropping the chamfer; keep cheek retraction steady and have tissue management materials opened but controlled.
steps.operatorCue: Cord, hemostatic, and cotton pliers should be within reach before the doctor asks for them.
steps.verification: Margins read cleanly around the prep and tissue is still manageable for cord placement.

predictedHandoff.label: Predicted Handoff
predictedHandoff.supportingItem: 00 cord, Hemodent pellet, and cotton pliers should come up together for the first pass.
predictedHandoff.timing: Once the final chamfer pass is clean
predictedHandoff.trigger: Release when doctor asks to pack cord.

steps.label: Step 04
steps.title: Cord, Tissue Control, and Final Capture
steps.detail: The room is moving into capture: maintain a dry field, manage retraction, and keep the scan path ready without losing the backup impression option.
steps.operatorCue: Scan tip stays clean, backup VPS material stays visible, and the prep should not sit idle between cord and capture.
steps.verification: Tissue is controlled, margins are visible, and the doctor can move straight into final scan.

predictedHandoff.label: Predicted Handoff
predictedHandoff.instrument: Scan wand or light-body impression set
predictedHandoff.supportingItem: Primary path is scan; VPS backup remains off the tray until replacement material is staged.
predictedHandoff.trigger: Advance after cord is seated and tissue is controlled.
